name: pi-friday
description_en: Dedicated communications side panel for pi — routes all conversation to a separate tmux pane with typewriter effect. Optional TTS and wake word detection. User data stored in ~/.pi/agent/friday/.
description_zh: pi 的专用通信侧边栏 — 将所有对话路由到具有打字机效果的独立 tmux 窗格。可选 TTS 和唤醒词检测。用户数据存储在 ~/.pi/agent/friday/。
